index.name: Domestic Silver Price
index.description: SILVERBEES provides leveraged commodity exposure compared to gold — silver exhibits 2-3x price volatility creating both opportunity and risk. Silver has dual-demand structure: ~55% industrial use (solar PV requires 120mg per panel, EVs use silver in switches/contacts, electronics/semiconductors, brazing alloys) and ~45% investment/jewellery. Structural tailwind from global solar capacity additions (targeting 2,000 GW by 2030) ensures industrial demand remains inelastic. Silver's industrial premium to gold means silver surges during manufacturing/capex upcycles but crashes during downturns. Perfect hedge for investors bullish on both inflation AND green energy transition. More volatile than gold but lower entry price (₹70/gm vs ₹7,000/gm gold) enables retail portfolio allocation. India is world's largest silver importer (70% of supply), making rupee depreciation a double tailwind (import duty adjustment + currency leverage).
